title: Bygone Effigy
move_pattern: Starts with Initial Sleep (dormant turn). Then uses Wake (gains 10 Strength). Then repeats Slashes indefinitely. A separate Sleep state exists in the machine but is unreachable in normal play.
notes: Begins combat sleeping — the first turn it does nothing but display a menacing thought bubble ("Your journey ends here..."). On turn 2 it wakes up, says "Shall we begin?", and immediately gains 10 [red]Strength[/red]. From turn 3 onward it attacks every turn with Slashes (15 damage, boosted by its Strength). Spawns with [yellow]Slow[/yellow] 1. The Wake transition also triggers the elite second-phase music cue, marking this as an elite-tier encounter.
